characters.description: AaaaPersonal InformationEpithet"Gentleman"[† 1]Swordsman[1]GenderMaleVirtual  /            Augmented     RealitiesSword Art OnlineOccupationNEETFirst AppearanceManga4koma Manga Log.002 (Cameo)4koma Manga Log.005 (Chronological)4koma Manga Log.006 (Actual)Aaaa(ああああ,aaaa?)was a non-canon character in the4koma mangaversion of theSword Art Online series. Swordsman[1] Aaaa was a fat man who wore glasses and was not good-looking.  He generally has a cross-weave head band and a black short sleeve underneath his jacket. Aaaa was a net game NEET who welcomed the announcement ofSword Art Onlinebecoming a death game as he could play online games consecutively this way. He was alolicon[† 2]type of person, thus he rejected love from older females and fell in love withSilica, who he began to stalk from the time she woke up to the time she went to sleep everyday. He has also warnedKiritorepeatedly to take care of Silica, otherwise he would butcher him.

characters.name: Afasys
characters.description: AfasysPersonal InformationAvatar Name (Japanese)[?]アファシス (Afashisu)System Name[?]Afasys[† 1]EpithetRei (零)GenderFemale (Gameverse Canon)Male (Alternative)Virtual  /            Augmented     RealitiesGun Gale OnlineFirst AppearanceGameFatal BulletAfasys(アファシス,Afashisu?), alternatively spelled asArFA-Sysin Western localisations, is an originalSword Art Online gamecharacter and theProtagonist's personal companion inSword Art Online: Fatal Bullet. Afasys is a rare Type-X model of anArtificial Intelligence(AI) companion called theArtificial Financial Adviser Systemand her full ID is Afa System Type-X A290-00.[citation needed]Due to Afasys only allowing the Protagonist to use Afasys's official name, the companion was nicknamed asRei(零,Rei?, lit. "Zero")byLeafain reference to the zeros appended to her Unit ID.[citation needed] Male (Alternative) Both female (canon) and male (alternative) versions of Afasys feature white and purple prominently as their canon looks. They both have purple eyes, white hair and a skin-tight, purple-on-white suit. While the female Afasys has short and straight hair, the male Afasys variant has short and messy hair.[citation needed] As a Type-X Unit, Afasys features a distinct personality, unlike the other models.[citation needed]Afasys is a clumsy companion who tends to make simple mistakes while handling a task, and is very forgetful in terms of remembering key information.[citation needed]As an AI companion, their battle personality can be adjusted by the Protagonist to suit their needs based on various parameters.[citation needed]While Afasys' core personality traits are predetermined, how they express themselves can also be adjusted by the Protagonist to sound bright, stoic, cute, zealous, or serious.[citation needed] With the addition of the first DLC,Champion of Gunfire, situational emotes have been added as adjustable parameters that allow Protagonist to decide how Afasys reacts to certain events, such as waving when the Protagonist meets a friend, or pumping their fist up in the air upon leveling up.[citation needed]

characters.name: Airy
characters.description: AiryPersonal InformationName (Japanese)エアリーName (Romaji)[?]EarīAgeOver 107GenderFemaleVirtual  /            Augmented     RealitiesProject AlicizationAffiliationAxiom ChurchOccupationElevating disk operatorMediaVoiced ByM・A・O[1]First AppearanceNovelVolume 12, Chapter 8, Part 3AnimeAlicization Episode 16GameAlicization LycorisAiry(エアリー,Earī?)is a minor character in theAlicization Arc. She is a young-looking girl who was assigned to operate the elevating disk between the 50th and 80th floors of theCentral CathedralinUnderworld, then known asElevating Operator(昇降係,Shōkō-gakari?). Airy looks like a young girl who wears a plain, black, long skirt, with a modest, see-through hem knitted onto the white apron, which hangs from her chest to below her knees, and no other accessories on herself. Her light brown hair, slightly grayed, is cut straight at her eyebrows and shoulders, with hardly any distinguishing facial features on her pale complexion. The hair is well-ordered but without even a shred of emotion. She also has deep, indigo-blue eyes, much like the blue skies at the height of summer. Her voice possesses the minimum level of vocal intonation and reveals no sort of emotion at all. Airy is mostly an emotionless person as she was assigned a mind-numbing task which she had been doing for over a hundred of years and, thus, most likely has not had much, if any, contact with the outside world, as, she herself admits that she knows nothing about the world aside from the disk she was assigned to operate and, when asked about what she wanted to do if she was freed, she replied that she wanted to fly freely on her elevating disk in the skies.

characters.name: Aki Natsuki
characters.description: Aki NatsukiPersonal InformationName (Japanese)安岐 ナツキName (Romaji)[?]Aki NatsukiGenderFemaleAffiliationSelf-Defense ForceOccupationNurseJGSDF Sergeant First Class (二等陸曹)MediaVoiced ByKawasumi Ayako (川澄 綾子)[1]Voiced By (English)Julie Ann Taylor[2]First AppearanceNovelVolume 5 Chapter 6MangaPhantom Bullet Chapter 3AnimeSII Episode 03Aki Natsuki(安岐 ナツキ,Aki Natsuki?)is a nurse who works for the Japan Ground Self-Defense Force (JGSDF) and was assigned byKikuoka Seijirouto overseeKirigaya Kazuto's medical condition at «Chiyoda Hospital» when he was hospitalized as well as during his rehabilitation. She is later assigned to watch over Kazuto during the «Death Gun» incident and after Kazuto is injected with succinylcholine. Aki Natsuki has a tall, slender body and is usually dressed in a light pink or white uniform. According to Kazuto's description, Nurse Aki is an extremely pretty woman with braided hair and glasses. He also mentioned that Natsuki had the clean and beautiful smile of a white-robed angel and that she can be quite scary when she wants to be. Aki Natsuki graduated from the «Tokyo Self-Defense Senior Nurse Academy». Since the Nursing Academy is affiliated with the Self-Defense Force, those who enroll in the Academy are treated as recruits entering the army. This is why Natsuki not only became a nurse but also received the rank of Sergeant First Class in the JGSDF, and should have been working in the Self-Defense Force's hospital.

characters.name: Alice Zuberg
characters.description: Alice ZubergSynthesis ThirtyZubergRLPersonal InformationName (Japanese)アリス・ツーベルクアリス・シンセシス・サーティName (Romaji)[?]Arisu Tsūberuku (Alice Zuberg)Arisu Shinseshisu Sāti (Alice Synthesis Thirty)EpithetFragrant OlivePriestess of Light (光の巫女)Age11 (at Prologue I)17 (during Chapter 1)19 (as of Chapter 5)Birthdate9th Day of the 4th Month[1], 361 HEC (Zuberg)[2]GenderFemaleVirtual  /            Augmented     Realities«Project Alicization»«Unital Ring»AffiliationAxiom Church, Integrity Knight OrderHuman Guardian ArmyFamilyGasupht Zuberg(Father)Sadina Zuberg(Mother)Selka Zuberg(Sister)OccupationIntegrity KnightMediaVoiced ByKayano Ai (茅野 愛衣)[3]Voiced By (English)Kayli Mills[4]First AppearanceNovelVolume 9, Prologue I, Part 1MangaProject Alicization Manga Chapter.001AnimeAlicization Episode 01GameHollow RealizationAlice Zuberg(アリス・ツーベルク,Arisu Tsūberuku?)is one of the main characters in theAlicization Arcand a supporting character in theUnital Ring Arc. She is the daughter ofRulid Village's chiefGasupht Zuberg, as well as the childhood friend ofEugeoandKirito. Due to accidentally breaking a clause of theTaboo Indexin her childhood, Alice was apprehended byDeusolbert Synthesis Sevenand taken to theCentral Cathedral, where she was forced to become anIntegrity Knight, namedAlice Synthesis Thirty(アリス・シンセシス・サーティ,Arisu Shinseshisu Sāti?), with her memories sealed. «Unital Ring» Having lost her will to fight following Supreme PriestQuinella's andChief Elder Chudelkin's death and Kirito entering a comatose state in the aftermath of the battle, Alice returned to Rulid Village with Kirito to avoid possible retribution on the boy's life, reuniting with her sisterSelka Zubergthere. Following a goblin attack on the village, during which Alice regained her desire to protect their world, Alice travelled to the Great Eastern Gate to join the Human Guardian Army in order to defend the Human Empire against an invasion by the Dark Territory Army. As a child, Alice is portrayed as a very caring person, going so far as to bring her friends lunch every day.[5]She can also be very strict, calling out Kirito and Eugeo when they are once again slacking off during their work[5]. Still, Alice herself does not always do as she is told, at one point even abusing a technicality in the Taboo Index, in order to convince her friends to accompany her into the Mountain Range at the Edge.[5] After becoming an Integrity Knight, Alice is shown to be very protective of the things important to her. Her desire to protect Underworld even overpowers her beliefs as an Integrity Knight and allows her to stand against Administrator.[18]Later, she is also shown strictly guarding Kirito while he is incapacitated, refusing to even let strangers close to him.[19] Alice is also portrayed as proud and noble. As such, she refuses to admit weakness, ask for help, or even accept it when offered - the only exception to this are people she trusts deeply, such as Kirito or Bercouli.[14][20]

characters.description: Alicia KlingermanPersonal InformationName (Japanese)アリシア・クリンガーマンName (Romaji)[?]Arishia KuringāmanGenderFemaleMediaVoiced ByKayano Ai (茅野 愛衣)[1]Voiced By (English)Kayli MillsFirst AppearanceNovelVolume 15, Chapter 14, Part 1AnimeAlicization Episode 28Alicia Klingerman(アリシア・クリンガーマン,Arishia Kuringāman?)was a supporting character in the War of the Underworld sub-arc of theAlicization Arc. She was the childhood friend ofGabriel Miller's, by whom she was murdered during the 2008 Global Financial Crisis. Alicia had blue[† 1]eyes[3]and long brown hair reached her shoulders. characters.name: Amayori
characters.description: AmayoriPersonal InformationName (Japanese)雨縁Name (Romaji)[?]AmayoriGenderFemaleRaceDragonVirtual  /            Augmented     RealitiesProject AlicizationAffiliationAlice Synthesis ThirtyFamilyTakiguri (Brother)Unnamed Mother[1][† 1]OccupationMountFirst AppearanceNovelVolume 11, Chapter 5, Part 5AnimeAlicization Episode 11GameUnleash Blading Amayori(雨縁,Amayori?)is a supporting character in theAlicization Arc. She isAlice Synthesis Thirty's dragon inUnderworld. Amayori is a gigantic, silver dragon[3]with triangular scales adorning its entire body. She has two wings that tower like a couple of spires[4], a long neck[3]and a long tail that draws an arc[4]. She has a faintly bluish fuzz growing under her neck[3]and has metal armour equipped on its chest and head when on duty.[4] Amayori is a very loyal dragon. Despite being released from a binding art that kept her under control and being encouraged to return home, Amayori continued to stay with Alice.

characters.description: AmayoriPersonal InformationName (Japanese)雨縁Name (Romaji)[?]AmayoriGenderFemaleRaceDragonVirtual  /            Augmented     RealitiesProject AlicizationAffiliationAlice Synthesis ThirtyFamilyTakiguri (Brother)Unnamed Mother[1][† 1]OccupationMountFirst AppearanceNovelVolume 11, Chapter 5, Part 5AnimeAlicization Episode 11GameUnleash Blading Amayori(雨縁,Amayori?)is a supporting character in theAlicization Arc. She isAlice Synthesis Thirty's dragon inUnderworld. Amayori is a gigantic, silver dragon[3]with triangular scales adorning its entire body. She has two wings that tower like a couple of spires[4], a long neck[3]and a long tail that draws an arc[4]. She has a faintly bluish fuzz growing under her neck[3]and has metal armour equipped on its chest and head when on duty.[4] Amayori is a very loyal dragon. Despite being released from a binding art that kept her under control and being encouraged to return home, Amayori continued to stay with Alice.

characters.name: An Si-eun
characters.description: An Si-eunRLALOPersonal InformationName (Japanese)安施恩Name (Romaji)[?]An Si-eunAvatar Name (Japanese)[?]シウネー (Shiunē)System Name[?]SiuneAge20GenderFemaleRaceVirtual  /            Augmented     Realities«Insect Site»«ALfheim Online»Briefly appeared in«Sword Art Online» (OS Version)«Project Alicization»Affiliation«Sleeping Knights»FamilyUnnamed brother[1]OccupationGuild Leader (ALO)[2]MediaVoiced ByShimamura Yū (嶋村 侑)Voiced By (English)Erika Harlacher[3]First AppearanceNovelVolume 7, Chapter 3MangaMother's Rosario MangaStage.003AnimeSII Episode 20GameLost SongAn Si-eun(安施恩,An Shiun?), known asSiune(シウネー,Shiunē?)in «ALfheim Online» (ALO), is a supporting character inMother's Rosario. She was the second sub-leader of the «Sleeping Knights», aguildof terminally ill patients who met inSerene Gardenand played various virtual reality games as a form of palliative care. An Si-eun had played a variety of virtual reality games, including Insect Site, until the guild eventually arrived to ALfheim Online, where An Si-eun chose to be anUndine. An Si-eun wears glasses, and, having lost her hair to chemotherapy, wears a wig as well.[1] An Si-eun'savatarhas long, light-blue hair which is almost pure white, one of the most defining feature of Undine players. She also has calm deep-blue eyes shining radiantly beneath her drooping eyelashes, a long nose, lustrous lips and surprisingly slender body, all of which give off the feeling of an excellent Undine healer. An Si-eun is kind at heart, but also somewhat sensitive and emotional.[citation needed]Si-eun is not as emotionally resilient asYuuki, as she was ready to give up many times, but, after meeting her and learning that she had been going through the same pain all her life, Si-eun forced herself to continue.[1]

characters.name: Andrew Gilbert Mills
characters.description: Andrew Gilbert MillsRLSAOALOPersonal InformationName (Japanese)アンドリュー・ギルバート・ミルズName (Romaji)[?]Andoryū Girubāto MiruzuAvatar Name (Japanese)[?]エギル (Egiru)System Name[?]AgilAge27 (Beginning of Aincrad arc)29 (End of Aincrad arc, Fairy Dance arc)30 (Phantom Bullet arc)BirthdateMarch 9, 1995[1][† 1]GenderMaleRaceVirtual  /            Augmented     Realities«Sword Art Online»«ALfheim Online»«Ordinal Scale»Briefly appeared in«Project Alicization»Affiliation«Two-Handed Builders» (SAO)[3]FamilyTrish[2](Wife)OccupationCafe OwnerMerchant (SAO)MediaVoiced ByYasumoto Hiroki (安元 洋貴)[4]Voiced By (English)Patrick Seitz[5]First AppearanceWebSword Art Online, Chapter 5NovelVolume 1, Chapter 5Progressive Volume 1, Chapter 1, Part 5(Chronological)MangaAincrad Manga Stage.003Progressive Manga Chapter 003(Chronological)AnimeEpisode 02GameInfinity MomentAndrew Gilbert Mills(アンドリュー・ギルバート・ミルズ,Andoryū Girubāto Miruzu?), known asAgil(エギル,Egiru?)inSword Art Online(SAO),ALfheim Online(ALO), andProject Alicization, is a supporting character in theAincrad Arcand a reoccurring character throughout theSword Art Online series. He was one of the 10,000 players who were trapped in «Sword Art Online» (SAO), where he was a veteran axe-wielder and a merchant who owned a shop inAlgade, a city on the 50thFloor of «Aincrad». After returning to the real world in the aftermath of the Sword Art Online incident, Andrew began playingALfheim Online(ALO) as aGnome. In real life, Andrew manages the «Dicey Café» with the help of his wife. Andrew is a massive and bulky[6]African-American[7]man with a brown goatee and brown eyes.[6]He is bald and wears two silver earrings on his left ear in both Sword Art Online and the real world.[8]At the beginning of the Sword Art Online official service, Agil wore a breastplate over a sleeveless shirt, light brown pants, and fur boots.[6]By the end of the Sword Art Online Incident, he wore jungle green robes and gray armor while in combat.[9]In the real world, Andrew wears a white shirt and a dark gray apron over pants of the same color.[8]Kirigaya Kazuto also commented that he is as large in real life as he is in-game.[10] Agil in ALO. Agil is a very friendly and helpful person who is always looking out for others. He is also trustworthy and reliable, shown when he defended thebeta testersagainstKibaou, gaveKiritoa place to stay, and helped players on lower floors. He also can be a leader on the battlefield and will help his comrades and friends no matter the cost. Although Agil acted as though he only cared about making money, Kirito commented that he had spent all of his helping mid-level players level up.

characters.name: Angel
characters.description: AngelPersonal InformationGenderFemaleRaceGoddessVirtual  /            Augmented     RealitiesSword Art OnlineALfheim OnlineOccupationNPCGoddessFirst AppearanceMangaGirls' Ops Stage.001TheAngelrefers to one of theNPCswhich are part of the «Ring of Angel's Whisper»quest. The Angel appears to be around the same height asLeafa, she has two wings on her back, and long hair. In her goddess form, she wears a dress decorated with flowers and a tiara decorated with wings and flowers, and no longer has wings. Her personality is one that is genuinely cold (and slightly hostile) towards people, though it is said that later on she would show a softer side of herself. Thus, she is a classical example of atsundere.

characters.description: ArashiPersonal InformationAvatar Name (Japanese)[?]アラシ (Arashi)System Name[?]ArashiGenderMaleVirtual  /            Augmented     RealitiesGun Gale OnlineAffiliationDyne's squadronMediaVoiced ByHiguchi Hirosumi (樋口宏澄)[1]First AppearanceNovelVolume 5, Chapter 3AnimeSII Episode 02Arashi(アラシ,Arashi?)is one of the members ofDyne'ssquadroninGun Gale Online. Arashi wears brown pants and top, with an armoured plate guarding the area between his chest and stomach.[2]He also wears dark brown gloves[2], sunglasses[2]and a helmet, which is decorated with a black feather[2]. Arashi is armed with an «M4 Carbine»[3]. Arashi took part in an attempt to ambush a Mob-hunting squadron in a wasteland field. Arashi was in charge of scouting for the enemy while the others chatted. After some time, Arashi alerted the others that the squadron was coming. After Dyne observed the squadron and toldSinonwhich player she should take out with hersniper, Arashi and the others proceeded to get closer to the squadron to be ready to engage them.

characters.name: Asada Shino
characters.description: Asada ShinoRLGGOPAURPersonal InformationName (Japanese)朝田 詩乃Name (Romaji)[?]Asada ShinoAvatar Name (Japanese)[?]シノン (Shinon)System Name[?]SinonEpithetHecate[1]Age16 (Phantom Bullet Arc,Alicization Arc)17 (Unital Ring Arc)BirthdateAugust 21, 2009[2]GenderFemaleHeight161 cm[3]BWHB80/W61/H81 (Web Novel)[3]RaceVirtual  /            Augmented     Realities«Gun Gale Online»«ALfheim Online»«Ordinal Scale»«Project Alicization»OccupationStudentMediaVoiced BySawashiro Miyuki (沢城 みゆき)Voiced By (English)Michelle Ruff[4]First AppearanceNovelVolume 5, Chapter 3MangaPhantom Bullet Manga Stage.001AnimeSII Episode 01[† 1]GameInfinity MomentAsada Shino(朝田 詩乃,Asada Shino?), known asSinon(シノン,Shinon?)in «Gun Gale Online» (GGO),ALfheim Online(ALO), as well as «Project Alicization», where she had temporarily used theSolus(ソルス,Sorusu?)account, is the deuteragonist of thePhantom Bullet Arcand one of the main characters in the War of the Underworld sub-arc of theAlicization Arc. She is a skilledVirtual Realitygame player, who began playing Gun Gale Online based on the suggestion from her friend,Shinkawa Kyouji, in an attempt to overcome her trauma concerning guns. After the events of the Phantom Bullet Arc, she began playing «ALfheim Online» as aCait Sitharcher, capable of hitting targets two hundred meters away with a bow that should only be able to shoot arrows accurately at a maximum distance of one hundred meters. Shino's appearance in real life. Similar to both of her VRMMO gameavatars, Shino has thin hair tied in small ribbons by the sides of her face, with the back cut short. Unlike her avatars, Shino has dark hair in real life. She also wears a pair of half-rimmed glasses with oval-shaped lenses. Her skin is pale and she has black eyes.[citation needed]She has a black spot on her right hand, left there by gunpowder from the time she fired a gun in real life.[5] Calm and cool are two words that best describe Sinon's personality. In battle and most of the time in the game, she keeps a cool head.[1]It is actually said that Kirito is the first one to make her extremely angry.[13]Despite all this, Sinon, while perhaps hard to approach, is generally a friendly person and does not mind helping others.[7] Shino, however, can be a fragile-minded character. This is due to her childhood incident that involved her killing a robber. If someone were to act as if they were shooting her in real life Shino would have a nervous breakdown and be on the verge of collapsing. People have used this to take advantage of Shino before. Not only this, but the guilt of taking another's life haunts Shino the same way killingLaughing Coffinmembers haunts Kazuto. After the Death Gun Incident, Shino has made progress with handling her trauma, as she did not have any serious reactions to seeing a model gun when Endou threatened to shoot her with one, and was even able to use it while feigning that she was not affected by it. This is due to her childhood incident that involved her killing a robber. If someone were to act as if they were shooting her in real life Shino would have a nervous breakdown and be on the verge of collapsing. People have used this to take advantage of Shino before. Not only this, but the guilt of taking another's life haunts Shino the same way killingLaughing Coffinmembers haunts Kazuto. After the Death Gun Incident, Shino has made progress with handling her trauma, as she did not have any serious reactions to seeing a model gun when Endou threatened to shoot her with one, and was even able to use it while feigning that she was not affected by it. Shino is shown to have an uncommonly kind heart. Not only was she willing to forgive Shinkawa Kyouji, but still cared for him as a friend to the extent that she resolved to visit him in prison to try and help, if not save him as a person.

Mito, operating under the name of "Ashley", was widely regarded asAincrad's number one tailor, owning a massive tailor shop called «Ashley's», which had two water wheels and was three times the size ofLisbeth's Smith Shop, in the northern section ofLindarth.[3]As a popular tailor, Ashley's policy was to only take custom jobs of interest, using only the rarest materials. In theGirls' Opsspin-off series, Ashley later began playingALfheim Online(ALO) where she also works as a tailor.[2]

characters.name: Ayano Keiko
characters.description: Ayano KeikoRLSAOALOPersonal InformationName (Japanese)綾野珪子Name (Romaji)[?]Ayano KeikoAvatar Name (Japanese)[?]シリカ (Shirika)System Name[?]SilicaEpithet«Dragon Master» (竜使い)[1]«Beast Tamer» (ビーストテイマー)[1]Age12 (Beginning ofAincrad Arc)14 (End of Aincrad Arc,Fairy Dance Arc)15 (Phantom Bullet Arc,Alicization Arc)BirthdateOctober 4[2], 2010[3]GenderFemaleRaceVirtual  /            Augmented     Realities«Sword Art Online»«ALfheim Online»«Ordinal Scale»Briefly appeared in«Project Alicization»FamilyAyano Tetsuhiko (Father)OccupationStudentMediaVoiced ByHidaka Rina (日高 里菜)Voiced By (English)Christine Marie Cabanos[4]First AppearanceNovelVolume 2, The Black Swordsman, Part 1MangaGirls' Ops Stage.001Fairy Dance Manga Stage.014(Chronological)AnimeEpisode 01(Cameo)Episode 04(Actual Appearance)GameInfinity MomentAyano Keiko(綾野珪子,Ayano Keiko?), known asSilica(シリカ,Shirika?)in «Sword Art Online» (SAO), «ALfheim Online» (ALO), and «Project Alicization», is a supporting character in theAincrad Arc, one of the main characters of theGirls' Opsspinoff, along withKirigaya Suguha(Leafa) andShinozaki Rika(Lisbeth), and a reoccurring character throughout theSword Art Online series. Silica is one of the 10,000 players who were trapped in Sword Art Online, where she was a dagger-wieldingBeast Tamer. She currently plays ALfheim Online as aCait Sith. In both the real world and Sword Art Online, Keiko's hair is light brown and tied into two tails by red ribbons, as well as two red ring baubles for her SAO avatar. Like her hair, Keiko's eyes in the real world are light brown; however, her SAO avatar had red eyes. Before meetingKirito, she wore a yellow robe with a dagger and pouch strapped to her waist at the back, a silver breastplate and pauldrons, brown leather gloves with metal bands, black shorts, and yellow boots. Afterwards, she wore a red robe of a similar design that exposed part of her shoulders and sides, a short black skirt, fingerless red gloves, and black, asymmetrical shoes with long black socks.[5] Keiko's ALfheim avatar is very similar to her SAO avatar, except for having an overall blue color, as well as possessing the cat ears and tail of the Cait Sith race.[6] Silica is very kind, bright, cheerful, and supportive of her friends.[citation needed]She also has developed a deep attachment to herTamed MonsterPinato the point that she was heartbroken to see it die and overjoyed when told that there was a way to revive it. At some point, Silica had become arrogant due to her fame, but realised her mistake after this led to her getting lost in theForest of Wanderingand losing Pina. Silica is also easily embarrassed and flustered, especially when it comes to a romance scenario, such as grabbing Kirito's hand, spotting many couples around her, or having her skirt flipped by a monster.

characters.name: Bazalt Joe
characters.description: Bazalt JoePersonal InformationAvatar Name (Japanese)[?]バザルト ジョー (Bazaruto Jō)System Name[?]Bazalt JoeGenderMaleVirtual  /            Augmented     RealitiesGun Gale OnlineOccupationRetired Policeman[1]MediaVoiced ByKoyama Rikiya (小山 力也)[2]First AppearanceGameFatal BulletBazalt Joe(バザルト ジョー,Bazaruto Jō?)is an originalSword Art Online gamecharacter and one of the side characters inSword Art Online: Fatal Bullet. Joe is very interested inArtificial Intelligence(AI) companions due to an event that occurred during his time as a policeman in a small town.[1] Bazalt Joe has narrow eyes with green pupils and a big scar on his right eye, which he always keeps closed. He wears a brown military cap over his short, black hair. His black and red vest, brown gloves and pants along with his simple, black boots give him a distinct look of a commando, ready for any kind of challenge.[citation needed] Bazalt Joe is a good-hearted, honest man, living up to his promises and proclamations, even if it is unattainable or detrimental to him. He is also incredibly stubborn and tenacious, refusing to give up on obtaining theProtagonist'sArFA-Sys unit, even after multiple failed attempts. He is, however, not inherently evil, as he always resorts to obtaining it in a fair fight or terms, never resorting to underhanded methods to attain his goal.[citation needed] Bazalt Joe is a good-hearted, honest man, living up to his promises and proclamations, even if it is unattainable or detrimental to him. characters.name: Behemoth
characters.description: BehemothPersonal InformationAvatar Name (Japanese)[?]ベヒモス (Behimosu)GenderMaleVirtual  /            Augmented     Realities«Gun Gale Online»OccupationHired Bodyguard (GGO)MediaVoiced ByMatsuda Kenichirou (松田 健一郎)[1]First AppearanceNovelVolume 5 Chapter 3MangaPhantom Bullet Chapter 1(cameo)Phantom Bullet Chapter 2AnimeSII Episode 01(cameo)SII Episode 02(actual)Behemoth(ベヒモス,Behimosu?)is a high ranked mercenary player in theVRMMO,Gun Gale Online, who is usually hired as a bodyguard for player groups with money but no perseverance. Behemoth uses a heavy «GE M134 Minigun» as his weapon of choice. Behemoth first appeared wearing a camouflage cloak and coat, which hid his equipment from the view of other players, while massive goggles covered his face and hid his expression. He has a huge body, broad shoulders, is nearly 2 meters tall and seemed to be wearing a large backpack at first, but this turned out to be his GE M134 Minigun, connected to a large capacity ammunition box via a belt. Unlike the other members of the Mob hunting party he was in, his lips were tight, without a slightest movement and he was walking slowly and silently in the back, giving off a feeling of pressure to an experienced player likeSinon. In battle, he forms a fierce smile. After Sinon's shot hits his goggles, it is revealed that he has grey eyes, blazing with light, as he formed another fearless smile, and that he has a rough face. Behemoth is a well-known minigun user in GGO and is said to be invincible in various group battles, if he gets adequate support from his teammates. He did not, however, appear in theBullet of Bulletstournaments, as his Minigun and 500 rounds of ammo put him overweight, which prevents him from being able to run during the match and makes him an easy target for snipers, especially since the BoB tournament is a solo encounter, meaning that there are no teammates to support him if he joins. Behemoth is a mysterious, silent, and expressionless person when not in battle. He is shown to be a calm and collected person, as shown by how he is not troubled or confused by the sudden death of his teammate and does not even take 3 seconds to locate Sinon. He likely enjoys firefights and killing other players, which is shown in the form of a fierce smile as takes his Minigun to open fire at the attacking PvP squadron. He is also an experienced and quick-witted person, as he is able to quickly read Sinon's plan of finding a suitable location for sniping and is able to locate and aim directly at her new location.

characters.description: BeowulfPersonal InformationAvatar Name (Japanese)[?]ベオウルフ (Beōrufu)GenderMaleVirtual  /            Augmented     RealitiesSword Art OnlineAffiliationLegend BravesOccupationSwordsmanFirst AppearanceNovelProgressive Volume 1, Rondo of a Fragile Blade, Part 7MangaProgressive Manga Chapter 009GameUnleash BladingBeowulf(ベオウルフ,Beōrufu?)is one of the 10,000 players who were trapped in «Sword Art Online» and a member of theLegend Braves, a team, formed for a virtual reality game three months before the release of Sword Art Online, who decided to play Sword Art Online together. Beowulf is a chubby[1]swordsman, who wore a chest guard, a viking helmet and wielded a two-handed sword[2] On December 8, 2022; Beowulf and his friends were spending the evening in a bar when Nezha joined them. characters.name: Bercouli Herlentz
characters.description: Bercouli HerlentzPersonal InformationName (Japanese)ベルクーリ・ハーレンツベルクーリ・シンセシス・ワンName (Romaji)[?]Berukūri Hārentsu (Bercouli Herlentz)Berukūri Shinseshisu Wan (Bercouli Synthesis One)EpithetThe LegendaryAgeAbout 300About 40 (biologically)DeathBetween sunset of 7th and sunrise of 8th Day of the 11th Month, HEC 380[citation needed]Fatal bleeding in the aftermath of a battle againstEmperor Vecta.[1]GenderMaleVirtual  /            Augmented     Realities«Project Alicization»AffiliationAxiom ChurchHuman Guardian ArmyFamilyFanatio (Partner)Berche Herlentz (Son)OccupationSwordsman (former)Guard chief (former)1st Commander of the Order ofIntegrity Knight(final)MediaVoiced BySuwabe Jun'ichi (諏訪部 順一)[2]Voiced By (English)Imari Williams[3]First AppearanceNovelVolume 9, Prologue I, Part 1(Mentioned)Volume 13, Chapter 10(Actual)AnimeAlicization Episode 01(Mentioned)Alicization Episode 17(Actual)GameAlicization LycorisBercouli Herlentz(ベルクーリ・ハーレンツ,Berukūri Hārentsu?), also known asBercouli Synthesis One(ベルクーリ・シンセシス・ワン,Berukūri Shinseshisu Wan?), was a supporting character in theAlicization Arc. He was one of the founders ofRulid Village, as well as the leader of theIntegrity Knights, and the oldest Integrity Knight in existence. Bercouli's weapon of choice was theTime Piercing Sword. Volume 13, Chapter 10(Actual) Alicization Episode 17(Actual) Bercouli was an extremely self-confident and prideful man due to his immense battle experience. However, Bercouli was also overconfident, as he showed much composure in front ofEugeo, by saying that he would spare his life, asFanatio's life was protected, and he continued chatting despite knowing that Eugeo was chanting an «Armament Full Control Art». He stated that he did not hold grudges, but was willing to take revenge if his disciple was killed. Bercouli was also a person with an impressive level of concentration, yet also relaxed even in intense situations, as he was able to maintain focus on his «Armament Full Control Art» even while leisurely conversing with Eugeo. Although Bercouli was the commander of the Integrity Knights and had his memories of his previous life suppressed, he maintained his critical thinking, as he held faint distrust against the instructions handed down by the Chamber of Elders, but nonetheless continued fighting on the church's side due to his wish for peace, and knowing peace would be impossible without theAxiom Church.[4]

Although Bercouli was the commander of the Integrity Knights and had his memories of his previous life suppressed, he maintained his critical thinking, as he held faint distrust against the instructions handed down by the Chamber of Elders, but nonetheless continued fighting on the church's side due to his wish for peace, and knowing peace would be impossible without theAxiom Church.[4]

characters.name: Cardinal (Underworld)
characters.description: CardinalPersonal InformationName (Japanese)カーディナルName (Romaji)[?]Kādinaru (Cardinal)GenderFemaleVirtual  /            Augmented     RealitiesProject AlicizationMediaVoiced ByTange Sakura (丹下 桜)[1]Voiced By (English)Lizzie Freeman[2]First AppearanceNovelVolume 11, Chapter 6, Part 2AnimeAlicization Episode 12GameAlicization LycorisCardinal(カーディナル,Kādinaru?)was a supporting character in theAlicization Arc. She was the embodiment of theCardinal System's error-checking sub-process inUnderworld, manifesting as an alternate, opposing personality ofQuinellawhen the latter merged the system with herFluctlight. Cardinal became a separate individual when Quinella transferred a copy of her memories to a girl namedLyceris(リセリス,Riserisu?), causing the girl's Fluctlight to break and thus allowing Cardinal to assume control of the body. This resulted in the two personalities immediately engaging in combat, which eventually forced Cardinal to take refuge in theGreat Library Room. After centuries of working behind the scenes, Cardinal joinedAlice Synthesis Thirty,Eugeo, andKiritoat the final battle against Quinella at the top of the cathedral, where she died in battle. Cardinal appeared as a scrawny, doll-like cute ten year old girl with milky-white skin, chestnut-brown eyes and short, curly hair of the same color. She wore a magician-like robe with velvet-like luster and a greatly inflated hat made from the same material and carries a staff longer than her own height, all of which made her look like an elderly scholar. Her most striking feature was her eyes, fringed by long eyelashes and beyond the round glasses, daintily worn on her nose, give an overwhelming presence of knowledge and wisdom. Just looking at these eyes made one feel like they were sucked into a depth with no definite end. She also had a somewhat elderly manner of speaking, but has a cute voice befitting her appearance. In an attempt to usurp the seat of god, Quinella took the Cardinal System of Underworld into herself, so that she could have no equal. However, doing so, she took in the Cardinal's two main processes: the main process, in charge of regulating the world, and the sub-process, in charge of performing error checks on the main process. Although the main process was in control for most of the time, during times of emotional distress, the sub process was able to float to the surface of the thought process and deemed the main process as an error in herself due to directly harming other people with her Fluctlight experiments. After the sub process unsuccessfully attempted to kill Quinella several times, Quinella realized that the sub process has become a threat and resorted to freezing her own emotions via manipulating her own Fluctlight to prevent the sub process from taking control. This plan succeeded and the sub process was made powerless for the next fifty years.

characters.name: Caynz
characters.description: CaynzPersonal InformationAvatar Name (Japanese)[?]カインズ (Kainzu)System Name[?]CaynzGenderMaleVirtual  /            Augmented     Realities«Sword Art Online»AffiliationGolden Apple(Former)FamilyYolko(Girlfriend)MediaVoiced ByKawashima Tokuyoshi (川島 得愛)Voiced By (English)Kyle Hebert[1]First AppearanceNovelVolume 8 A Murder Case in the AreaAnimeEpisode 5Caynz(カインズ,Kainzu?)is one of the 10,000 players who were trapped in the online game «Sword Art Online». He was a former member of the guildGolden Appleand teamed up withYolkoto find out who killedGriselda. Caynz has a short crop of brown hair and small, dark eyes. As a front line warrior, he wears heavy metal armour for battle.[2] Caynz is a person who seeks justice, much like Yolko, for instance, he imitated being murdered to find and apprehend the perpetrator behind Griselda's death. Like his girlfriend, Caynz is a good actor, as he managed to fool the entire crowd of players, including Kirito and Asuna, into believing that he was PK-ed within the safe zone. characters.name: Ceba
characters.description: CebaPersonal InformationAvatar Name (Japanese)[?]セバ (Seba)System Name[?]CebaGenderFemaleRaceVirtual  /            Augmented     RealitiesSword Art OnlineALfheim OnlineFirst AppearanceNovelchromatic colorsPart 2GameInfinity MomentCeba(セバ,Seba?)was one of the 10,000 players who were trapped inSword Art Online. After being freed from Sword Art Online, Ceba began playingALfheim Onlineas aLeprechaun. Ceba has a pet dog, named Yodare, in the game. Ceba had wanted to be an artist since she was a child. She had graduated from high school and decided to go to art school, but unwillingly became trapped in Sword Art Online for two years. Although Ceba returned to the real world alive, she was too scared that she had lost her drawing skills during the two years, thus she was unable to draw anything, and decided to hide in ALfheim Online. However, there she unconsciously drew a street scene on parchment, and theorised that by drawing in the virtual world, she would be able to reacquire her ability in the real world as well. But as virtual reality games did not support drawing, while Ceba felt the need to draw specifically inNew Aincrad, she sought for a viable large canvas, and eventually discovered rumours about a hidden boss on the5th Floorof New Aincrad dropping an item called the «Guild Flag», which could serve as the largest canvas in the game.[1] On February 8, 2026, Ceba attempted to challenge the hiddenbosson the 5th Floor of New Aincrad, but was defeated after only depleting two of its sixHit Pointbars. Before she could respawn, she heard another player, who had come to fight the same boss with his party, telling her to wait. Several moments later, Ceba'sRemain Lightwas retrieved and she was revived in a safe area nearby. Ceba introduced herself to the party, while one member of the group,Yuuki, introduced herself and the other members of her party:Asuna,Kirito, andSinon. Kirito materialised a picnic set, while Ceba materialised a bavarois and explained why she wanted to defeat the boss.

characters.name: Charlotte
characters.description: CharlottePersonal InformationName (Japanese)シャーロットName (Romaji)[?]Shārotto (Charlotte)EpithetObserverAgeAbout 200GenderFemaleVirtual  /            Augmented     RealitiesProject AlicizationAffiliationCardinalOccupationFamiliarMediaVoiced ByHonna Youko (本名 陽子)[1]First AppearanceNovelVolume 10, Chapter 3, Part 1AnimeAlicization Episode 08GameAlicization LycorisCharlotte(シャーロット,Shārotto?)was a supporting character in theAlicization Arc. She wasCardinal's oldest and most trusted familiar, sent to observeKiritoandEugeoon their journey to theCentral CathedralinCentoria,Underworld. While observing, Charlotte was a very small pitch-black spider with four deep crimson-red eyes and eight slender legs. Most of the time, she was less than five millimeters in size. However, she was actually a giant spider that was over two meters in overall length and had a tough-looking carapace.[2]In this form, she had a jet-black shell that gleamed like the rasta colors, tinged with gold in the light.[2]Her claws growing on her eight legs looked like black crystals.[2]Two of her legs were visibly larger and their claws were long enough to bear resemblance to swords.[2]Charlotte also had thick, short fangs growing from her mouth.[2] As an observer, Charlotte believed that it was her duty not to interfere with her observed parties and also believed that she did not have any emotions, nor had she ever been interested in the parties that she had to observe. Only after meeting Kirito and Eugeo did she start to change. She became influenced by them and began showing certain emotions, like anxiousness, curiousness and frustration. She had also decided to interfere with certain events on multiple occasions to help the two young men on their journey, using excuses, like her interference making her observations more efficient, to justify her actions. Moreover, after meeting the two mysterious young men, she spent more time pondering about various details, instead of just observing them, like she used to do until then. Charlotte grew so attached to the boys that she continued following them even after being relieved from her duty and even sacrificed her life to buy enough time for Cardinal to come. Charlotte's main wish was to finally return to a corner of theGreat Library Roomthat she used to live in. She also expressed a wish to see the land of the Dark Territory to confirm its existence with her own eyes.
